videos.headline: Ashton Jeanty stiff-arms his way to a Boise State TD
videos.description: Ashton Jeanty's filthy stiff-arm clears a path to a Broncos touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Ashton Jeanty stiff-arms his way to a Boise State TD) 2023/09/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: Penix bobbles the snap then finds McMillan for a Washington TD
videos.description: Michael Penix Jr. bobbles the snap then fires a dart to Jalen McMillan to give the Huskies a lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Penix bobbles the snap then finds McMillan for a Washington TD) 2023/09/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: Penix and McMillan connect for their 2nd Washington TD
videos.description: Michael Penix Jr. launches a dime to Jalen McMillan for the duo's second touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Penix and McMillan connect for their 2nd Washington TD) 2023/09/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: Michael Penix launches his 3rd TD of the 1st half
videos.description: Michael Penix Jr. launches his third passing touchdown to Ja'Lynn Polk to pad the Huskies' lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Michael Penix launches his 3rd TD of the 1st half) 2023/09/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: Kamren Fabiculanan's INT sets up a Washington TD
videos.description: Kamren Fabiculanan snags the interception, then Michael Penix Jr. finds a wide-open Jack Westover to give the Huskies a 28-9 lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Kamren Fabiculanan's INT sets up a Washington TD) 2023/09/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: Ashton Jeanty takes the HB screen 50 yards to the house for Boise St.
videos.description: Ashton Jeanty breaks a few tackles on his way to a 50-yard Broncos touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Ashton Jeanty takes the HB screen 50 yards to the house for Boise St.) 2023/09/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jalen McMillan's 3rd TD pads Washington's lead
videos.description: Jalen McMillan takes the Wildcat to the house for his third touchdown of the game.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jalen McMillan's 3rd TD pads Washington's lead) 2023/09/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: Washington's fourth down gamble pays off for a TD
videos.description: Dillon Johnson punches it in from the one to give the Huskies a 49-19 lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Washington's fourth down gamble pays off for a TD) 2023/09/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: Bruener's INT sets up Cuevas' 31-yard TD for Washington
videos.description: Carson Bruener returns the interception into Boise State's territory, then Dylan Morris finds Josh Cuevas for a 31-yard Washington touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Bruener's INT sets up Cuevas' 31-yard TD for Washington) 2023/09/02 ESHEET
